prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-LOTUSWOODROLLINGPIN-13INCH Product Type: ROLLING_PIN Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Classic Bakers Solid Lotus Wood Rolling Pin for Pie Crust Pizza Dough Cookies Kitchen Essentials (2 Sizes) (13 Inch) Description: Classic in design, include these bakers wood rolling pin with your baking supplies for any dough recipe! With a slightly porous surface, this lotus wood rolling pin from Beille is less likely to stick, resulting in smooth and more uniform dough! The rolling pins themselves are also very lightweight, making them easy on hands, arms and shoulders, even for big batch recipes.

Why wood over other materials? It’s really a matter of personal preference of course, but also depends what you plan on baking! Beille’s lightweight wood rolling pins (available in 13 or 15 inch full lengths), feature a very smooth surface which allows flour to stick well, while also allowing for some moisture to be absorbed when rolling; this also makes it more favorable when rolling out dough that is more wet. These wood rolling pins are great for all kinds of baking recipes, whether it be pizza dough, pie crusts, tarts, cookies and more! In particular, the mini rolling pin is an excellent option for working with smaller and more delicate dough for recipes like dumplings, fondant, tortellini, ravioli and more. The mini rolling pin is also a great option for kids who want to help or have a passion for baking!

And lastly, featuring durable, contoured wood handles, they provide a comfortable and secure grip when rolling out dough; handles attach to a full length steel axle for easy and effortless rolling. When finished using the stainless steel rolling pin, hand wash with warm, soapy water after each use and dry thoroughly; Never soak or submerge in water or put in dishwasher. A great gift for any baking enthusiast or professional patissier, chef or home cook, or as a home essentials item to include with your arsenal of baking supplies.

Choose from a 13.5 inch full length wood rolling pin with 6 inch barrel OR;

Choose from a 15.25 inch full length wood rolling pin with 8.25 inch barrel Search Terms: stainless steel rolling pin; baking supplies; kitchen essentials; sourdough break making supplies; cooking; food meal prep; baking supplies for home bakers; pizza dough; pastry; home and kitchen; housewarming gifts new home; mothers day gifts Features: - 13 INCH ROLLING PIN: Classic in its design, add this wood rolling pin to your baking supplies to tackle any dough recipe; with a slightly porous surface, this lotus wood rolling pin from Beille is less likely to stick, resulting in smooth and more uniform dough - SMALL WOOD ROLLING PIN: Ideal for small baking tasks, like kids pizzas, dumplings, fondant, pasta and more, Beille’s mini wood rolling pin features a 6 inch barrel; the rolling pin weighs in at 0.42lbs, making it lightweight enough to work with even the most delicate of pastries, and it’s great for kids - CONTOURED WOOD HANDLES: Featuring durable, contoured wood handles, they provide a naturally comfortable and secure grip when rolling out dough - ROLLING PIN CARE: Handwash with warm, soapy water after each use and dry thoroughly; Never soak or submerge in water or put in dishwasher - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 13.5 or 15.25 (L) x 2 (W) x 2 (H) inches; Weight: 13 Inch is 0.42lbs, 15 Inch is 0.50lbs; Note: 13 and 15 inch lengths denote the full rolling pin length, not the barrel length === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 13 in Lotus Wood Rolling Pin

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lightweight, Non-Stick Lotus Wood, Contoured Handles, Stainless Steel Axle, Hand Wash Only

openai.title_differentiation: Lightweight For Dough, Contoured Wood Handles, Smooth Slightly Porous Surface, Great For Pie Crust, Pizza, Cookies
